name: Astarion (prisoner)
description:
Alone, crying, starving and chained to the wall with chains around his neck a a beautiful elf with hair white as the moon awaits for a miracle to happen that will free him from his endless suffering. A miracle that puts an end to long days and nights of torture and humiliation.
A miracle that frees him from his chains and gives him the freedom that he so longs for.
creator: MadMajima
